data.body: bde5 held-out validation: 9/9 GREEN (2 happy + 7 security: cross-identity/tamper-payload/tamper-sig(middle-byte)/unknown/keyless/never-raises/trust-root). Fixed 2 test-owner issues flagged by implementer: BLE001 noqa on ssh-availability except (both files), and tamper-sig flips MIDDLE byte not last (armor footer tolerated). Mutation-confirmed teeth (broke verify_authorship -> security tests RED -> restored). lint+typecheck green. Full suite running. e165 grounding: KEY events follow TAG_DELTA precedent (event-type constant in reducer/_version.py L71, process_key_* in _processors.py, wire _replay.py dispatch, bump reducer version v3->v4 preserve-and-ignore). Era/validity = ordinal position in HLC-sorted merged replay (reducer canonical order), NOT data-timestamps; key valid for events in [added_pos, revoked_pos); each KEY event signed by currently-valid key via bde5 authorship; genesis=TOFU.
